mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle ( plate_number, vehicle_type, brand, model, color, load_capacity, status, device_id, driver_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{plateNumber}, #{vehicleType}, #{brand}, #{model}, #{color}, #{loadCapacity}, #{status}, #{deviceId}, #{driverId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.plate_number, v.vehicle_type, v.brand, v.model, v.color, v.load_capacity, v.status, v.device_id, v.driver_id, d.name as driver_name, v.current_longitude, v.current_latitude, v.last_update_time, v.create_time, v.update_time, v.speed FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN driver d ON v.driver_id = d.id WHERE v.id = #{id}

SELECT v.id, v.plate_number, v.vehicle_type, v.brand, v.model, v.color, v.load_capacity, v.status, v.device_id, v.driver_id, d.name as driver_name, v.current_longitude, v.current_latitude, v.last_update_time, v.create_time, v.update_time, v.speed FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN driver d ON v.driver_id = d.id WHERE v.plate_number = #{plateNumber}
